en: I tried to rent out her sexual organs on a one-use basis.

en: Jeremy? Where's Mark? And what the hell are you doing here?
I know my rights. I've spoken to my friends at the Citizens Advice Bureau.
ko: 안니, 빨리 가자. 케터링까지 두 시간 걸려. 최고급 비머로도. 내 권리를 알아. 시민 상담소 친구들이랑 얘기했어. 돈 내!

en: Pay up, or I shall make a disturbance.

en: Now will you go back out with me? Er, no, Jez.
I'm just not really that into you.

en: In that case, if you'll excuse me.
